producers.name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

authoring_entity.name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

version_statement.version: v1: Edited, anonymised data for public distribution

study_info.abstract: The GYTS is a school-based survey that collects data on students aged 13–15 years using a standardized methodology for constructing the sample frame, selecting schools and classes, and processing data. The GYTS surveillance system is intended to enhance the capacity of countries to design, implement, and evaluate tobacco control and prevention programs.
study_info.universe: The target group of the survey are learners aged 13-15 years in the selected schools.
study_info.notes: The core module of the GYTS asks learners about their tobacco use and consumption intensity, and their use of smokeless tobacco products, and attempts to quit and relapses. The survey also collects data on their exposure to second-hand smoke, access to and purchasing of tobacco products, learners' knowledge of tobacco advertising and anti-tobacco messages, and their attitudes and beliefs about using tobacco.

data_collection.sampling_procedure:
Methodology:
School-based survey of students aged 13-15 years
Multistage sample design with schools selected proportional to enrollment size
Classrooms chosen randomly within selected schools
All students in selected classes eligible for participation
Anonymous and confidential self-administered questionnaire
Countries may add questions to the questionnaire
Computer-scannable answer sheets
Requires only 30-40 minutes to administer
Fieldwork conducted in 6-8 weeks
Country-level data with regional-level stratification possible
Core questionnaire (standard set of survey questions used in all locations)
data_collection.research_instrument: The Global Youth Tobacco Survey has a core questionnaire, with optional, add-on modules. The core questionnaire is used for all countries.

contact.name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

dataset_use.cit_req: World Health Organisation. Global Youth Tobacco Survey Kenya 2013 [dataset]. Version 1. Geneva: WHO [producer], 2016. Atlanta: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [distributor], 2016.
dataset_use.conditions: Public use files, available to all
